name: tachyon_compile
description: Compile Solidity with forge and return normalized artifacts (ABI + bytecode) plus a stable project_id. Self-contained: pass `sources` as a map of workdir-relative path -> file content (contracts under src/, tests under test/); @openzeppelin/contracts/... and forge-std/... resolve automatically against the shared engine's baked corpus. The returned project_id threads into tachyon_deploy / tachyon_call to resolve the ABI.

sources.description: Map of workdir-relative path (e.g. "src/Token.sol") to Solidity source. Contracts under src/, tests under test/.

targets.description: Optional contract names to return artifacts for; empty returns all.

project_id.description: Override the derived project id (normally let it default to the deterministic sources hash).

via_ir.description: Compile through the Yul IR pipeline.

name: tachyon_test
description: Run a Forge test suite and return structured per-case results (pass/fail/gas). Like tachyon_compile, pass `sources` (tests under test/, contracts under src/; forge-std + @openzeppelin available) to test uploaded contracts on the shared engine. Optionally narrow with match_path / match_contract / filter.

sources.description: Map of workdir-relative path -> content (tests under test/, contracts under src/).

name: tachyon_simulate
description: Dry-run an eth_call against a chain without broadcasting. Read-only. Returns the raw return data (and revert reason if it reverts). Provide pre-encoded `data`, the target `to`, and a `chain_id` (or rpc_url).

rpc_url.description: Explicit RPC URL instead of a chain profile.

name: tachyon_deploy
description: Deploy a compiled contract on-chain. WRITE: signs + broadcasts via the caller's embedded wallet (the daemon's agent identity is forwarded automatically; custody policy is enforced wallet-side). Resolve the contract by `contract` name + the `project_id` returned from tachyon_compile. `idempotency_key` makes redeploys safe (a prior deploy with the same key + chain returns the existing address).

idempotency_key.description: Caller-chosen key; repeat to dedupe a redeploy. Required.

contract.description: Contract name to deploy (must exist in the registry for project_id). Required.

project_id.description: Project id from tachyon_compile that owns the artifact.

from.description: Deployer address override (defaults to the agent wallet).

name: tachyon_call
description: Invoke a contract method. With simulate_only=true it is a read (eth_call, no wallet). Otherwise it is a WRITE that signs + broadcasts via the caller's embedded wallet (agent identity forwarded automatically). Encode by `method` + `args` (ABI resolved from inline `abi` or from `contract` + `project_id`), or pass pre-encoded `data`.

rpc_url.description: Explicit RPC URL instead of a chain profile.

from.description: Caller address (defaults to the agent wallet).

method.description: Function name to ABI-encode (with args). Omit to use pre-encoded data.

args.description: Arguments for method, in ABI order.

abi.description: Inline ABI JSON to encode against (else resolved from contract+project_id).

contract.description: Contract name to resolve the ABI from the registry.

project_id.description: Project id owning the artifact for ABI resolution.

data.description: Pre-encoded calldata hex (0x...) when method is omitted.

simulate_only.description: true = eth_call read (no broadcast, no wallet); false = broadcast.

spend_cap_wei.description: Optional per-tx spend cap (wei) for the broadcast.

name: tachyon_chain_list
description: List the chain RPC profiles the engine knows about (id, name, chain_id, explorer) and which is active. Read-only.

name: tachyon_chain_register
description: Register (or update) a custom chain RPC profile so later compile/deploy/call can target it by id.

name: tachyon_artifact_get
description: Fetch a cached compile artifact (ABI + bytecode) by contract name and project_id. Read-only.

name: tachyon_registry_lookup
description: Resolve a prior deployment by idempotency_key + chain_id (returns address, tx hash, confirmation state, or found=false). Read-only.

idempotency_key.description: The key used at deploy time. Required.

chain_id.description: Chain id the deploy targeted. Required.
